nodes.title: Character 4 (LoRA D)
widgets_values: character_d, A hyperrealistic of a female K-pop idol, 21 years old. Natural Korean beauty with symmetrical features, expressive eyes, soft jawline. Hyper-detailed real human skin — visible pores on nose and cheeks, natural uneven skin tone with slight redness around nose and cheeks, tiny moles, scattered freckles, fine peach fuzz visible when backlit. Subtle under-eye circles, minor blemishes, skin creases around eyes when smiling.
